title: Retool User
description: A user account in a Retool organization with role-based access control.

id.description: The unique UUID identifier for the user.

email.description: The user's email address, unique within the organization.

isAdmin.description: Whether the user has administrator privileges.

isDisabled.description: Whether the user account is disabled.

userType.description: The user type determining default access level.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user was last updated.
